LAW AND MOTION 302, EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER IS GRANTED. COURT STATES FINDINGS AS SET FORTH IN THE TRANSCRIPT OF THE COURT REPORTER. COUNSEL SHALL REPORT BY TOMORROW, JULY 12, 2016 THEIR AGREEMENT ON DISCOVERY, BRIEFING AND HEARING SCHEDULES, AND SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] ORDER. A $500,000.00 BOND, SHALL BE POSTED BY JULY 18, 2016. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2016 Off Calendar

Hearing Re Ex Parte Application For Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jul-11-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Attorney, Michael H. Strub (310-277-1010), for plaintiff/applicant, NYAM, LLC
Attorney, Jeffrey M. Reisner (949-760-0991), for plaintiff/applicant, NYAM, LLC
Attorney, Kent J. Schmidt (714-800-1445), for defendant/opposing party, Bebe Studio

Appearaing Telephinically:
Joe Sutton, Joseph Gabbay, Ralph Gindi, Bruce Ewing

Ex Parte Application For Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction is called for hearing on the record. The matter is argued by both sides as set forth in the court reporter's transcript.

12:05 PM: Court declares lunch recess.

01:50 PM: Hearing resumes with all counsel and the Court present.

The cause is argued by both sides.

02:41 PM: Court declares recess;

02:56 PM: Hearing resumes with all counsel and the Court present.

Ex Parte Application for temporary restraining order is GRANTED. Court states findings as set forth in the transcript of the court reporter. Counsel shall report by tomorrow, July 12, 2016 their agreement on discovery, briefing and hearing schedules, and submit a [proposed] order. A $500,000 bond, shall be posted by July 18, 2016.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (D302)
